title: Skyblock - The Real Adventure
description: SkyBlock - The Real Adventure is a modpack that re-invents the classic SkyBlock experience with story-driven quests, immersive survival challenges, and deep progression to turn your floating island into a true epic odyssey.
body:
## SkyBlock - The Real Adventure: A Focus on Pure Survival

**SkyBlock - The Real Adventure** is a challenging modpack that completely overhauls the classic SkyBlock experience by focusing on **immersive survival** and a grand sense of adventure. Forget complex automation and magical machines; this pack emphasizes **resource management**, exploration, and overcoming environmental obstacles using only core mechanics and focused gameplay enhancements.

Guided by a **detailed, story-driven quest book**, you will be challenged to expand your tiny floating island into a viable, self-sustaining world. Progression is centered around smart resource usage, creative expansion, and tactical survival against tougher, more varied mobs. Every block and every resource matters. This is the ultimate test of survival skills and ingenuity, turning your small patch of dirt into an **epic, long-term adventure**.

![Favorite the modpack](https://img.shields.io/badge/Favorite%20the%20modpack-red?style=for-the-badge&logo=heart&logoColor=white) ![Difficulté](https://img.shields.io/badge/Difficulty-Challenging-e32525?style=for-the-badge&logo=skull&logoColor=white) ![Genre](https://img.shields.io/badge/Genre-Pure%20Survival-darkgreen?style=for-the-badge&logo=minehut&logoColor=white) ![Focus](https://img.shields.io/badge/Focus-Resource%20Management-55866b?style=for-the-badge&logo=hammer&logoColor=white)
![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-In%20Development-orange?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)

Actual Roadmap:
- [X] Explore the worlds to get more ressources -> Happy Ghast is the solution
- [-] Better advancements with rewards -> No mods for this now
- [-] Access to end (need blazes) -> No idea for now
